property.name: mapreduce.framework.name
property.description: Configures MapReduce to run on YARN

property.name: mapreduce.map.memory.mb
property.description: Resource allocation for Map task container

property.name: mapreduce.map.java.opts
property.description: JVM heap memory size for Map tasks

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.memory.mb
property.description: Resource allocation for Reduce task container

property.name: mapreduce.reduce.java.opts
property.description: JVM heap memory size for Reduce tasks

property.name: mapreduce.task.io.sort.mb
property.description: Buffer size in MB for sorting map outputs before disk spill

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.address
property.description: IPC server address for the Job History Server

property.name: mapreduce.jobhistory.webapp.address
property.description: Web application HTTP address of the Job History Server
